title: Project Manager (Investment & Process Improvement) – Medical Device
description:
• Well Established Company
  • Basic $7400 to $9300 + AWS + Variable Bonus
  • Excellent Welfare and Benefits + Career progression
  • Working location: Boon Lay
  • Working day: Monday to Friday
  • Working hours: 8.30am to 5.30pm


Job Responsibilities:


PROJECT MANAGEMENT:

  • Plan, organize, and oversee investment and process improvement projects from initiation to completion.
  • Develop detailed project plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocations.
  • Monitor project progress, manage risks, and ensure deliverables align with business objectives.
  • Prepare and deliver status reports, project documentation, and presentations to stakeholders and senior management.

PROCESS IMPROVEMENT & OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE:

  • Analyze current investment and operational processes to identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for optimization.
  • Design and implement streamlined processes, tools, and methodologies to improve accuracy, productivity, and compliance.
  • Apply Lean, Six Sigma, or other continuous improvement frameworks to drive measurable performance enhancements.
  • Track and measure process improvements, ensuring sustainable implementation.

STAKEHOLDER MANAGEMENT:

  • Collaborate with internal teams (Finance, Operations, Compliance, Technology) to align project goals with organizational strategy.
  • Communicate project objectives, timelines, and progress clearly across all levels of the organization.
  • Manage relationships with external partners, vendors, and consultants as required.

DATA & FINANCIAL ANALYSIS:

  • Support investment analysis, feasibility assessments, and ROI evaluations.
  • Use data-driven insights to guide decision-making and project prioritization.
  • Prepare financial models and business cases for investment initiatives.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Finance, Engineering, or related field.
  • Project Management Professional (PMP), PRINCE2, or Lean Six Sigma certification strongly preferred.
  • 5+ years of experience in project management, preferably within investment, finance, or process improvement functions.
  • Experience with process optimization, business transformation, or continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Proficient in project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Asana, Jira, Smartsheet) and Excel


Candidates are encouraged to apply this position via Apply Now button with the following information in the resume

  • Work experiences and job responsibilities
  • Current and Expected salary
  • Reason for leaving
  • Date of availability
  • Education background


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



NG DIAUM YEE (R2198031)

EA Recruitment Pte Ltd

EA License No: 21C0492

With a combined experience of more than 10 years, we thrive on providing our clients/candidates with the best and most sincere services. We believe not only in the business aspect of things, but able to help individuals & organisations on a personal level.


Empowerment - To empower our team in making sound decisions, efficiently.

Ethical – To behave ethically, and to make moral decisions based on integrity.

Accomplishment – We strive to accomplish all planned objectives and conquering set milestones.

Accountable – We are accountable for our actions, decisions, and consequences.

Assurance – We are committed to provide the best services to our clients


We provide permanent full-time and/or temporary placements, contract staffing solutions and foreign workers recruitment.
